title: Constant Contact vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs Sendinblue: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: Constant Contact vs Sendinblue: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and Sendinblue comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while Sendinblue targets transactional email and SMS campaigns. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Sendinblue?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while Sendinblue is stronger for transactional email and SMS campaigns. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point ($12/mo vs $25/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Sendinblue to Constant Contact is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
